name: I talked to the insurance adjuster already after my crane injury—did I mess up?

mainEntity.name: I talked to the insurance adjuster already after my crane injury—did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Possibly, as adjusters record statements to lowball; don't sign anything without review.** They probe for fault admissions in Utah/Idaho claims.[1][2] Key factors: (1) Statements used against you in comparative fault; (2) no legal duty to speak without lawyer; (3) workers' comp separate but impacts third-party; (4) retract via attorney.[3] Stop contact, request statement transcript, consult lawyer to counter. Early legal help fixes most issues.
